quote_text: Both Learning-oriented assessment on the one hand and aligning assessment to the CEFR descriptors on the other hand are relevant to both assessment in the classroom and tests/examinations. As regards alignment, the CEFR website provides descriptors and video clips illustrating learner performances in order to guide teachers and learners in their assessment of learning progress.

Cambridge English has a range of qualifications suitable for developing the language skills needed to succeed in the workplace. All our examinations are mapped to the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR), the international framework for describing language ability. The CEFR levels can be directly related to different job roles and skills.

The Cambridge English Skills Test Business is an online, on-demand, modular test of English needed in the workplace for adult learners aged 16+. It tests all four English skills (Speaking, Writing, Reading and Listening) from A1 to C1 on the CEFR, the international scale of English ability. Results are ready in 48 hours.

Teachers and academic managers will have access to a powerful results dashboard to monitor the performance of groups of candidates. It will allow the comparison of one class with another class, or one class over time, and it can be done by overall CEFR level or by language skill.
page_or_section: What reporting is available for teachers and academic managers?

quote_text: Whichever solution you choose for your organization, Versant by Pearson guarantees you will receive English proficiency scores you can trust. Versant by Pearson English Tests are flexible, affordable language testing that you control.
page_or_section: Language testing and certification you can trust

quote_text: Versant by Pearson Tests evaluate all four language skills or assess specific abilities. The English Speaking and Listening Test provides a comprehensive view of an individual's English communication skills.

Since 2007, Allingua has been a trusted partner for organizations and international institutions in Luxembourg, delivering tailor-made language training in over 20 languages - on-site, online, or blended.

With our digital tools, we ensure precise and transparent monitoring of progress: Placement and progress tests aligned with the CEFR. Personalized progress reports delivered to learners, HR, and managers at every stage.
With Ltesting, our adaptive testing platform in 29 languages, we evaluate your employees' levels and identify their specific needs according to their role and professional context.
Assess speaking, writing, listening and reading skills with a 30-minute online test. Receive a CEFR-aligned report within 24 hours, evaluated by native examiners.
Audit employees' language skills, identify the gaps, and boost their internal mobility prospects. Go beyond theory. Reveal true Luxembourgish language ability.
page_or_section: Streamlined Luxembourgish testing for your program

quote_text: Aligned with the CEFR, Pipplet uses open-response questions, mirroring real-world scenarios to truly understand what your candidate can and can't do in the target language.
